title: lithospermum officinale
intro: Lithospermum officinale, also known as Glaucium officinale, is a flowering plant species in the borage family, Boraginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum officinale include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the immune system, as well as its use in treating various conditions such as wounds, ulcers, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Lithospermum officinale is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
